name: Notification Scope Risk
description: Advisory mod that surfaces broad/unscoped broadcast-notification language (@channel, notify all, company-wide, all-hands, ...) in title + body + evidence excerpts so a reviewer checks the blast radius.
advises_on: Broad/unscoped broadcast-notification language (@channel, notify all, company-wide, all-hands, ...) in title + body + evidence excerpts.
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Surfaces over-broad notification scope; a routing signal, never a finding-of-record.
